entries.expected_target_description: Description of the specific artifact or conversation expected for this search.
entries.notes: THIS IS A PLACEHOLDER ENTRY ONLY. DO NOT USE FOR EVALUATION.

entries.expected_target_description: Description of the theme or content set that should be retrieved.
entries.notes: THIS IS A PLACEHOLDER ENTRY ONLY. DO NOT USE FOR EVALUATION.

entries.expected_target_description: The specific conversation or imported item containing the Pirate Jingles / pirate-themed poetry composed during a ThoughtReach brainstorming session.
entries.notes: Highly specific known artefact. Should return the pirate poetry conversation as the top result.

entries.expected_target_description: The conversation or authority document where the Antigravity Execution Protocol was first defined or discussed.
entries.notes: Acronym query. Must resolve to the execution protocol discussion, not generic process discussions.

entries.expected_target_description: Any and all conversations where the ThoughtReach viewed-state (visitedResults) mechanism was discussed, designed, or patched.
entries.notes: Should surface multiple results across the search-result interaction design conversations.

entries.query_text: search result card visual hierarchy polish
entries.expected_target_description: Conversations covering the visual design and styling refinements to result cards, including the why-this-matched line and metadata header separation.
entries.notes: Should surface Step 255 and related design conversations. Tests thematic recall.

entries.query_text: where did we decide to use conversation_id as the result grouping key
entries.expected_target_description: The specific conversation where the decision to group search results by conversation_id was discussed and finalised.
entries.notes: Navigation query targeting a design decision point. Tests ability to locate decision provenance.

entries.query_text: where we first renamed ThoughtReach from its original name
entries.expected_target_description: The conversation where the project name was established or changed to ThoughtReach.
entries.notes: Tests navigation to a unique historical event in the project timeline.

entries.query_text: all discussions about search authority files
entries.expected_target_description: All conversations referencing the design, creation, or integration of the ThoughtReach Search Authority document.
entries.notes: Collection query — should return multiple distinct conversations. Tests breadth of recall, not single-item precision.

entries.query_text: every time we discussed embedding or semantic search implementation
entries.expected_target_description: All conversations where embedding generation, vector similarity search, or retrieval tuning were discussed.
entries.notes: Collection query. Wide recall test — expect 5+ results across multiple imported conversations.

entries.query_text: what have we said about search quality and result ranking
entries.expected_target_description: All conversations covering search result quality, ranking logic, similarity scoring, and evaluation approaches in ThoughtReach.
entries.notes: Synthesis-preparation query. Should surface a spread of relevant conversations for the user to review before making ranking decisions.

entries.query_text: what are all the ways we discussed handling duplicate or overlapping results
entries.expected_target_description: Conversations discussing deduplication, excerpt merging, result grouping, and adjacency logic in the search results pipeline.
entries.notes: Synthesis-preparation query. Tests ability to surface distributed discussion about a technical design theme.

entries.expected_target_description: The conversation(s) where the contextRadius / lineContextBefore / lineContextAfter expansion mechanism was designed or patched.
entries.notes: Tests retrieval of a specific technical implementation discussion using domain-specific terminology.

entries.query_text: first time we discussed importing raw text as opposed to structured conversations
entries.expected_target_description: The earliest conversation where raw-text import mode was distinguished from structured conversation import in ThoughtReach.
entries.notes: Navigation to a design branch point. Expected result is a single early conversation, not a broad set.
